summary: Reportes > Ventas Enhanced Module Testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 14/14 pytest tests passed covering 5 endpoints (summary, by-day, by-month, top, filter-options). Frontend: All 3 tabs working (Resumen, Comparación Anual, Top) with multi-year comparison, line/bar charts, and unidades-first ordering.
passed_tests: 1. Backend: GET /api/reportes/ventas/summary?range=YTD returns kpis, yoy, yoy_pct ✓
2. Backend: GET /api/reportes/ventas/summary?range=MTD returns different date range ✓
3. Backend: Filter by tienda works - GET /api/reportes/ventas/summary?tienda=BOOSH ✓
4. Backend: GET /api/reportes/ventas/by-day?range=YTD returns current and previous arrays ✓
5. Backend: GET /api/reportes/ventas/by-month returns months array with 8 years (2019-2026) ✓
6. Backend: by-month structure has month, month_name, year data objects with unidades/ventas_soles/ordenes/clientes ✓
7. Backend: by-month cut logic - March data partial (only up to day 6 across all years) ✓
8. Backend: by-month ytd_totals has per-year totals with correct values ✓
9. Backend: by-month filter by tienda=BOOSH works ✓
10. Backend: GET /api/reportes/ventas/top?group_by=clientes ordered by unidades DESC ✓
11. Backend: GET /api/reportes/ventas/top?group_by=modelos ordered by unidades DESC ✓
12. Backend: GET /api/reportes/ventas/top?group_by=tiendas ordered by unidades DESC ✓
13. Backend: GET /api/reportes/ventas/top?group_by=items ordered by unidades DESC ✓
14. Backend: GET /api/reportes/ventas/filter-options returns all arrays ✓
15. Frontend: Sidebar shows Reportes > Ventas submenu with collapsible group ✓
16. Frontend: Resumen tab - UNIDADES KPI card is first and highlighted (ring-2 bg-blue-50) ✓
17. Frontend: Resumen tab - KPIs show unidades=22,902 (+24.0%), ordenes=2,563, clientes=679, ventas=S/1,116,806 ✓
18. Frontend: Resumen tab - Daily chart shows 'Unidades diarias vs. año anterior' (not Soles) ✓
19. Frontend: Comparación Anual tab - Line chart shows 8 years (2019-2026) with distinct colors ✓
20. Frontend: Comparación Anual tab - Can switch to Bar chart ✓
21. Frontend: Comparación Anual tab - Numeric table has Mes, years columns, %YoY per cell ✓
22. Frontend: Comparación Anual tab - TOTAL YTD row at bottom (22,902 for 2026 +24.0%) ✓
23. Frontend: Comparación Anual tab - Cut date shows 'corte al Mar 6' ✓
24. Frontend: Comparación Anual tab - CSV export button present ✓
25. Frontend: Top tab - Table columns: #, Cliente, Unidades (first numeric), Ventas S/, Ordenes ✓
26. Frontend: Top tab - Results ordered by Unidades DESC (3,395 → 1,298 → 758...) ✓
27. Frontend: Top tab - Group by selector (Clientes/Modelos/Items/Tallas/Colores/Tiendas) ✓
28. Frontend: Top tab - CSV export button present ✓
critical_code_review_comments: Backend reportes.py: New by-month endpoint correctly implements multi-year aggregation with fair cut at today's day
Backend by-month SQL uses EXTRACT(MONTH/DAY) for partial month filtering - efficient query
Backend top endpoint ORDER BY unidades DESC correctly prioritizes units over soles
Frontend ReportesVentasPage.jsx: Clean 3-tab implementation with proper data-testid attributes
Frontend YEAR_COLORS map provides distinct colors for 8 years in charts
Frontend MonthlyTable component correctly calculates %YoY per cell and shows TOTAL YTD row
Frontend KpiCard highlight prop correctly applies ring-2 ring-blue-200 bg-blue-50/30 to Unidades card
seed_data_creation: None - used existing production data via materialized view
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reportes > Ventas module fully enhanced. Now has 3 tabs: Resumen (KPIs with Unidades prioritized, daily chart showing unidades), Comparación Anual (multi-year line/bar chart 2019-2026, numeric table with %YoY per cell, CSV export), Top (rankings ordered by unidades DESC). Backend by-month endpoint returns months array with cut at today's day for fair YoY comparison. All endpoints use crm.mv_ventas_reporte materialized view.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no bugs found. All requested enhancements implemented correctly.
